task_completion.description: Navigate to the Database Backup settings in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer interface with the 'Database Backup' settings page open.
A checkbox, toggle, or radio button corresponding to 'Scheduled Database Backup' is checked or enabled in the UI.

task_completion.description: Set the backup directory to the expected path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The backup directory input field contains exactly '/opt/ManageEngine/EventLog/backup'.
A dropdown menu, radio button, or selection box for the schedule is set to 'Daily'.
The agent clicking the 'Save' button on the settings page, or a success message/notification confirming the settings have been saved.

task_completion.description: Create the confirmation file in the home directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing a command creating the file (e.g., 'touch ~/backup_config_done.txt') or a file manager displaying 'backup_config_done.txt' in the user's home directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EventLog Analyzer web interface to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are made within a web browser showing the actual EventLog Analyzer application, not by directly editing backend configuration files in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the configuration values into the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The path and schedule are visible inside the application's actual input fields, rather than just typed into a text editor or terminal prompt.

integrity.description: The confirmation file was genuinely created on the system
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation is executed in a real terminal emulator or file manager, not just written as text in an unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected backup path is exactly '/opt/ManageEngine/EventLog/backup'. The schedule must be set to 'Daily'. The confirmation file must be named 'backup_config_done.txt' and located in the user's home directory (/home/ga/).
